welcome.title: Welcome to ClinicWork
welcome.subtitle: The private AI workspace for your clinic.

steps.title: Open your clinic folder
steps.desc: Point ClinicWork at your clinic's files — intake forms, letters, spreadsheets.

steps.title: Describe the task
steps.desc: Draft a recall message, tidy an intake form, summarize a fax. ClinicWork does the work.

steps.title: Review and approve
steps.desc: You approve every action. Patient health information stays on your terms.

features.title: Patient intake
features.desc: Turn new-patient forms and faxes into clean, structured records.

features.title: Appointment recall
features.desc: Draft reminders and win-back messages for lapsed patients.

features.title: Front-desk drafts
features.desc: Write patient emails, letters, and callbacks in your clinic's voice.

features.title: Documentation help
features.desc: Summarize and tidy clinic paperwork without leaving your machine.

features.title: Control your browser
features.desc: Look up codes, portals, and references in the built-in browser.

features.title: Bring your own model
features.desc: Route through your clinic's own key and compliant gateway.

zh.title: 欢迎使用 ClinicWork
zh.subtitle: 属于你诊所的私有 AI 工作台。

steps.title: 打开诊所文件夹
steps.desc: 让 ClinicWork 访问诊所文件——登记表、信函、表格。

steps.title: 描述任务
steps.desc: 起草复诊提醒、整理登记表、总结传真，ClinicWork 帮你完成。

steps.title: 确认操作
steps.desc: 每一步都由你批准，患者健康信息始终由你掌控。

features.title: 患者登记
features.desc: 把新患者表格和传真整理成规范结构化记录。

features.title: 复诊召回
features.desc: 为流失患者起草提醒与召回信息。

features.title: 前台文书
features.desc: 用诊所的语气撰写患者邮件、信函与回访。

features.title: 文档协助
features.desc: 在本机总结与整理诊所文书，无需外传。

features.title: 操控浏览器
features.desc: 用内置浏览器查询编码、门户与参考资料。

features.title: 自带模型
features.desc: 通过诊所自己的密钥与合规网关接入。
